Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x6BE0 "DOUBLETAKE-C000-6BE0" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $c000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Double Take.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $C000 to turn off interrupts from the two CIA chips and ack any pending CIA interrupts to allow the game to run correctly.
Note: although the space used at $C000 appears to be occupied, it is actually used for the title screen and is initialised on game startup, so can be used safely.
